notes.euraxess: Queries (professor/investigador/robotics/AI) all returned same 10 results — filter parameters appear ignored without JS. Portugal-filtered page shows mostly BI research grants (studentships), not faculty positions. No professor/investigador faculty positions found from Portugal in page-1 results.
notes.uc_apply: 10 open procedures found. 2 directly in Informatics/CS/AI area. Strong hit: IT136-26-3 (IA).
notes.sigarra_spup: Shows U.Porto-wide openings. Faculty concurso docente openings visible: FEUP Minas (217/2026), FEUP Mecânica (216/2026), FEUP Civil (145/2026), FMUP Patologia (198/2026), FBAUP Artes (214/2026), FPCEUP Psicologia (117/2026). None in CS/AI/Robotics. Also: BI research grant in NorteIA+ (Transparent AI) at FPCEUP — not a faculty post.
notes.sigarra_feup: Page shows procurement contracts only (equipment purchases), not faculty openings. Faculty posts for FEUP visible via SPUP page.
notes.ulisboa: Faculdade de Ciências had 2 CS openings (Programação, Organização Sist. Computacionais) — both PAST (deadline 17/02/2026). Current open: Arquitetura (FA) + Finanças (ISEG). No CS/AI open at ULisboa currently.
notes.ipleiria: Active concursos primarily health/nursing. One Informatics (web dev) from 2025 with rectification in 2026 — deadline unclear.
notes.ipc: All active procedures past deadline or in jury evaluation phase. No CS/AI.
notes.ua_ubi_uminho: All js-heavy — no content extractable. UA concursos page returned title only.
notes.ist_tecnico: News page accessible but no concurso docente openings listed. Faculty recruitment not visible in recent news.
notes.dre: Both DRE search URLs failed (Readability + Firecrawl returned no content).
